_doc: The baseline pollenwatch version the cleanroom test installs FIRST, before upgrading to HEAD. Default is v1.3.0 — the last released version before the v3 schema migration. Override with --baseline <tag> for smoke runs or future baselines.

v1.3.0.notes: Last v1.x release. Config-entry VERSION=2; flow field is the legacy 'allergens' key. Migration to HEAD will run v2→v3 (renames allergens → selected_species in options).

v2.0.0.notes: First v3-schema release. VERSION=3. Config-flow is TWO-step (user→species). Migration target for v1.x baselines.

v2.1.0.notes: HEAD as of 2026-05-31 (authoritative level attribute + silver-rule cleanup + full entity translations). VERSION=3, same TWO-step flow shape as v2.0.0. Default smoke target.

_when_to_update: Add a new entry under 'versions' when a new release is tagged AND its flow VERSION or species field changed. Bootstrap errors loudly on unknown baseline tag. Don't change 'default_baseline' without a deliberate reason — it's what 'make cleanroom-pretag' uses with no override.
